calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for Petitioner.

The Court will allow all distributions with the exception of Georgina Apodaca's interest for filing of her 13100 Declaration. Mr. Schneider explained the extent of services provided to support the request for extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission for the Court to review the amount of fees.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Continued To Dec-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
